product: 基盤地図情報 建築物の外周線 (FGD building outlines, feature type BldA)
license: 基盤地図情報 (GSI) — 測量法 承認申請-exempt; attribution + 加工表示 (processing note) required
procedure: scripts/fetch_fgd_kanto_buildings.py (module docstring): register at the FGD download service, select 建築物の外周線 for the four mainland-Kanto prefectures, download the JPGIS(GML) archive(s), place them under source_placement, set publication_vintage above, then run: uv run python scripts/fetch_fgd_kanto_buildings.py
note: Registration-gated manual download. publication_vintage and the generated metadata.json (feature_count, per-archive sha256) are filled in when the owner completes the pinned download; the raw archive and the gigabyte-scale buildings.geojson stay out of git.
